variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 18837 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 18837 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 18837 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 155.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 132.5 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 85.5 mm, Height 1 (H1): 287.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 281.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P776615 Air Filter, Primary Finned | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18837
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P776615 Air Filter, Primary Finned | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18837
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Air Filters? Strong, pliable gasket is compressed against the air cleaner housing to create a tight seal. • High-efficiency cellulose media performs across a wide range of heavy-duty engine applications. • Corrosion resistant, coated steel liners support media during operation and help maximize airflow. • Pleatloc™ feature ensures uniform pleat spacing and prevents media from bunching to promote longer service life.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25720K Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18837
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF25720K Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18837
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25720K axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
